summary: Tested hero heading font size transition when contact form opens/closes on desktop (1080px) and mobile (390px). All checks passed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hero heading CSS transition fix verified. Desktop: initial ~70px → 38px on form open → restores to ~70px on close. Mobile: 40px → 26px on form open. Heading bounding box top stays >= 0 (no overflow above viewport).
